overview: This Vintage archetype leverages Doomsday to rapidly dig for mana rocks and tutors, establishing a powerful board state. Lurrus of the Dream-Den enables recursive casting of cheap spells, creating infinite loops or repeated Doomsday cycles. Psychic Frog accelerates card draw and hand management, ensuring the combo pieces are found quickly while applying pressure.
win_conditions: Infinite mana and tutor recursion via Lurrus of the Dream-Den
Digging for a win-more finisher like Emrakul or Oblivion Stone after Doomsday
Repeated Doomsday cycles to find answers and close out the game

keep_criteria: Hand contains Doomsday and at least two cheap tutors or accelerants
Hand features Psychic Frog with multiple one-mana spells
Multiple lands and a clear path to turn two or three Doomsday
mulligan_criteria: No Doomsday and no cheap spells to enable Lurrus recursion
Too many lands or high-cost cards that slow down the combo
Lack of card draw or hand size management tools

early_game: Play lands and cheap tutors to stabilize and draw into Doomsday
Cast Psychic Frog to draw two cards and discard a dead draw
Prioritize finding Doomsday or setting up Lurrus recursion
mid_game: Cast Doomsday to dig for mana rocks, tutors, and win conditions
Use Lurrus to replay Doomsday or key tutors for infinite loops
Manage hand size and discard carefully to avoid losing combo pieces
late_game: Execute infinite mana and tutor loops to win on the spot
Use Lurrus to repeatedly cast Doomsday for additional answers
Stabilize against interaction by cycling through the top of the library

key_cards.name: Doomsday
key_cards.role: Core combo enabler that reshuffles the top three cards and draws seven
key_cards.notes: Cast as early as possible, ideally turn two or three, to find mana rocks and tutors for the Lurrus loop

key_cards.name: Lurrus of the Dream-Den
key_cards.role: Recursive engine that allows replaying cards from the graveyard
key_cards.notes: Use to repeatedly cast Doomsday, Brainstorm, or Preordain to generate infinite value or find win conditions

key_cards.name: Psychic Frog
key_cards.role: Card draw and hand management tool that synergizes with cheap spells
key_cards.notes: Cast early to dig for Doomsday or tutors, and discard dead draws to keep the combo pipeline efficient

sequencing_tips: Play Psychic Frog before Doomsday to increase the odds of drawing the combo enabler
Prioritize casting one-mana tutors before Lurrus to maximize recursion potential
Discard high-impact combo pieces only if necessary, keeping Doomsday and Lurrus in hand or graveyard
Use Lurrus to replay Doomsday after resolving the first one to maintain momentum

matchups.advice: Race to cast Doomsday before they resolve countermagic or hand disruption
Prioritize fast Doomsday and use Lurrus to replay cheap answers or win conditions
Use Psychic Frog and Doomsday to dig for interaction or out-combo them with infinite loops
Avoid playing into their graveyard hate and use Lurrus to bypass it
Disrupt their spell chain with Doomsday-dug interaction or win before they assemble
Race to infinite mana before they cast their win condition
Play around countermagic and use Lurrus to replay Doomsday for additional answers
Dig for removal or win quickly with Lurrus recursion before they swarm
Prioritize speed and use Psychic Frog to find answers to their aggressive starts
Race their big spells with Doomsday and infinite loops
